title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rail Vikas Nigam - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rail Vikas Nigam - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rail Vikas Nigam family as a Distribution Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rail Vikas Nigam:
Rail Vikas Nigam is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rail Vikas Nigam!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
